hooks.command: source .env 2>/dev/null; SLUG=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('atlas.json'))['slug'])" 2>/dev/null) && curl -sf -X PUT "$ATLAS_URL/api/projects/$SLUG" -H "Authorization: Bearer $ATLAS_TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @atlas.json > /dev/null && echo '[Atlas] sync ok' || true
